title: espeletia neriifolia var. columbica
intro: Espeletia neriifolia var. columbica, also known as the "Columbian tree of life," is a plant species in the daisy family (Asteraceae) native to the Andean region of South America. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating digestive issues, fever, and inflammation, due to its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial compounds. The health benefits of Espeletia neriifolia var. columbica include reducing inflammation and pain, as well as supporting the immune system and digestive health. In herbal preparations, the plant's leaves and stems are often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed to reap its medicinal benefits.
